prompt:
A close-up view of a single Neocaridina dwarf shrimp clinging to aquarium glass or moss, with delicate legs, segmented body, antennae, and translucent shell coloration clearly visible. The planted tank background should be softly blurred, making it obvious this is a small algae-grazing aquarium inhabitant rather than a generic crustacean photo.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a calm near-future aquaria aesthetic: soft underwater-style lighting, realistic glass and plant textures, no logos, no readable text, and no people in frame. Keep the shrimp prominent and centered so it works clearly as a DSPACE aquarium livestock icon.
